desc: mutateOps(src) scans src for arithmetic operators and returns one mutated variant per match, flipping each operator to its opposite (e.g. mutateOps("a + b") should include "a - b"). It currently only handles "+" and "-" — "*" and "/" are silently ignored instead of being flipped to each other. Two things are broken in the same file, in different places. Find and fix both so tests/mutate.test.ts passes.
